topics.name: enterprise risk management
topics.description: The organization-wide program for identifying, assessing, and managing risk across all business units and risk categories.

topics.name: operational risk
topics.description: Risk arising from failed or inadequate internal processes, people, systems, or external events.

topics.name: third-party risk
topics.description: Risk introduced by vendors, suppliers, and other external parties the organization depends on.

topics.name: technology risk
topics.description: Risk arising from the organization's technology, infrastructure, and system dependencies.

topics.name: compliance risk
topics.description: Risk of legal or regulatory sanction, financial loss, or reputational damage from failing to comply with obligations.

topics.name: risk assessment
topics.description: The process of identifying and evaluating the likelihood and impact of risks.

topics.name: risk treatment
topics.description: The process of selecting and implementing measures to modify (mitigate, transfer, avoid, or accept) an assessed risk.
